name: Frost
description: Frosted glass behind the window. The scene behind the surface is blurred and lightly tinted, and shows through wherever the window itself is translucent. Lowering the Content opacity parameter fades the window content so the frost has translucency to fill.
author: PlasmaZones

parameters.name: Blur radius
parameters.description: How strongly the scene behind the window is blurred (px)

parameters.name: Corner radius
parameters.description: Corner rounding of the frost slab (px, match the Border pack)

parameters.name: Content opacity
parameters.description: How visible the window content stays over the frost, where 1.0 is fully opaque and 0.0 shows only the blurred backdrop

parameters.name: Tint strength
parameters.description: How much of the tint colour is mixed over the blurred scene

parameters.name: Tint colour
parameters.description: Colour mixed over the blurred scene
